history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A person wearing a black hoodie and sweatpants stands on a paved walkway at night. The hoodie has white text on the back that reads "Hypocrite" in large gothic font, with smaller text below. The walkway is made of rectangular stone pavers and is bordered by a strip of grass and a row of green bushes with small red flowers. To the right of the walkway is a tall, light grey concrete wall. Behind the wall, parts of a modern building structure are visible, including angled rooflines and horizontal beams, all silhouetted against a dark night sky. A single streetlamp on the left illuminates the walkway and the person. The lighting is dim and atmospheric, casting soft shadows. The overall color palette is dominated by dark blues, greys, blacks, and the subtle reds of the flowers. The mood is quiet and contemplative, with a touch of urban mystery. The image has a slightly grainy, low-light aesthetic.
